channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer admits he must ‘turn things around’ as US adds to pressure over defence spending
item.description: Starmer admits he must ‘turn things around’ as US adds to pressure over defence spending

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer braced for wave of resignations as confident Burnham readies top team
item.description: Starmer braced for wave of resignations as confident Burnham readies top team

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – as it happened

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Watch UK Defense Secretary’s Exit Shatters Starmer’s Legacy - Bloomberg.com

item.title: i Politics: Morgan McSweeney is already back advising Keir Starmer

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It’s fascinating how the deadenders will proudly go “look, you fool, we’ve been in power for two years and not a single Cabinet minister could possibly be expected to actually adjudicate between the Treasury and the M...
item.description: It’s fascinating how the deadenders will proudly go “look, you fool, we’ve been in power for two years and not a single Cabinet minister could possibly be expected to actually adjudicate between the Treasury and the M...

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Vows to Fight On After Defense Chief’s Resignation - Bloomberg.com
